zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert FitzWalter於1300年之前出生在英國艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特時，他的父親Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter52歲，母親Alianore De Ferriers27歲。他於大約1320年與Joan Multon在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年5月6日在英國艾可亨哈姆，埋葬在英國艾可登莫福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert FitzWalter于1300年之前出生在英国艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特时，他的父亲Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter52岁，母亲Alianore De Ferriers27岁。他于大约1320年与Joan Multon在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年5月6日在英国艾可亨哈姆，埋葬在英国艾可登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert FitzWalter was born before 1300, in Woodham Walter, Essex, England, his father, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, was 52 and his mother, Alianore De Ferriers, was 27. He married Joan Multon about 1320, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 6 May 1328, in Henham, Essex, England, and was buried in Dunmow, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert FitzWalter est né avant 1300, à Woodham Walter, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Alianore De Ferriers, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Multon environ 1320, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1328, à Henham, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert FitzWalter vor 1300 in Woodham Walter, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter 52 und seine Mutter Alianore De Ferriers 27. Er hat um 1320 in Cumberland, England Joan Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1328 in Henham, Essex, England und wurde in Dunmow, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert FitzWalter è nato il prima del 1300 nel Woodham Walter, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Alianore De Ferriers, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan Multon circa 1320, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 maggio 1328, nel Henham, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Dunmow, Essex, England.

ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert FitzWalterが1300年以前にイギリスエセックスウッドハム ワルターで生まれた時，父Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalterは52歳，母Alianore De Ferriersは27歳であった。約1320年にイギリスクウンバーランドでJoan Multonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年5月6日にイギリスエセックスヘンハムで死去し，イギリスエセックスダンモウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert FitzWalter(이)가 1300년 이전 영국 에세스 우드함 월터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore De Ferriers(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 c벌랜드에서 Joan Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 5월 6일 영국 에세스 헨함에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 던모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert FitzWalter nasceu antes 1300, em Woodham Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Alianore De Ferriers, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Multon aproximadamente 1320, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1328, em Henham, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert FitzWalter родился перед 1300 г. в местности вудхам валтир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore De Ferriers, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Multon около 1320 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 мая 1328 г. в местности хенам, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности дунмоу, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert FitzWalter nació antes de 1300, en Woodham Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Alianore De Ferriers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan Multon aproximadamente 1320, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1328, en Henham, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra.
